CustomObject.description: Maps a source OpportunityLineItem field to a target QuoteLineItem field for the Copy-OLI-to-QLI accelerator. Each row copies one OLI field value down to the matching QLI field when a Quote is created from an Opportunity. Salesforce only auto-copies STANDARD OLI fields to QLIs; this drives the custom-field copy. Modelled as a Custom Metadata Type (not the vendor's List custom setting) so the mapping rows ship as version-controlled, deployable metadata.
CustomObject.label: Quote Line Item Field Mapping
